---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? Describe the use case,
not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, related issues, or roadmap items (see `/contributors`).
